title: Evolutionary Analyses of Visual Opsin Genes in Frogs and Toads
author: Ryan K Schott
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.b3yqqpvw
materials: Keep all reagents on ice at all times.

Program the thermocycler for the following program: 95 °C for 00:10:00 94 °C for 00:02:00 REPEAT FOLLOWING 3 steps 35-50 times: 94 °C for 00:00:30 45-50 °C for 00:01:00 *temperature depends on primer 72 °C for 00:02:00 72 °C for 00:02:00 4 °C hold

steps.title: Transfer sample into a 1
steps.instruction: Transfer sample into a 1.5 mL l collection tube.

steps.title: Pipette off RNALATER
steps.instruction: Pipette off RNALATER.

steps.title: Add 600 µL Buffer RLT
steps.instruction: Add 600 µL Buffer RLT.

steps.title: Add 6 µL Beta-mercaptoethanol
steps.instruction: Add 6 µL Beta-mercaptoethanol.

steps.title: Pipette into Qiashredder column
steps.instruction: Pipette into Qiashredder column. Spin 00:02:00 @ 8,000rpm.

steps.title: Remove Qiashredder column; Add cap; Spin 00:03:00 @ max speed
steps.instruction: Remove Qiashredder column; Add cap; Spin 00:03:00 @ max speed.

steps.title: Add 600 µL 70% Ethanol to new collection tube
steps.instruction: Add 600 µL 70% Ethanol to new collection tube.

steps.title: Transfer lysate to the collection tube;...
steps.instruction: Transfer lysate to the collection tube; mix lysate and 70% Ethanol by pipetting.

steps.title: Transfer lysate to RNeasy column (...
steps.instruction: Transfer lysate to RNeasy column ( 700 µL at a time). Spin 00:00:15 @ 9,800rpm; Discard flow through. Add rest of lysate; Spin 00:00:15 @ 9,800rpm; Discard flow through.

steps.title: Add 700 µL Buffer RWI
steps.instruction: Add 700 µL Buffer RWI. Spin 00:00:15 @ 9,800rpm.

steps.title: Transfer RNeasy column to new collection tube
steps.instruction: Transfer RNeasy column to new collection tube.

steps.title: Add 500 µL Buffer RPE
steps.instruction: Add 500 µL Buffer RPE. Spin Spin 00:00:15 @ 9,800rpm; Discard flow through.

steps.title: Add 500 µL Buffer RPE –...
steps.instruction: Add 500 µL Buffer RPE – Spin 00:01:00 @ 9,800rpm; Discard Flow through/ Spin 00:02:00 @ 13,000rpm.

steps.title: Transfer RNeasy column to new collection tube
steps.instruction: Transfer RNeasy column to new collection tube.

steps.title: Elute with 30 µL RNAse-Free H 2 0
steps.instruction: Elute with 30 µL RNAse-Free H 2 0. Spin 00:01:00 @ 13,000rpm.

steps.title: Elute with 30 µL RNAse-Free H...
steps.instruction: Elute with 30 µL RNAse-Free H 2 0- Spin 00:01:00 @ 13,000rpm.

steps.title: Combine mRNA and RNAse-free H 2...
steps.instruction: Combine mRNA and RNAse-free H 2 0 to standardize all samples to aliquots containing 0.4 µg mRNA total in 10 µL .

steps.title: Pipette 3 µL of Master Mix 1 into each sample
steps.instruction: Pipette 3 µL of Master Mix 1 into each sample.

steps.title: Place sample on dry bath at 65 °C for 00:05:00
steps.instruction: Place sample on dry bath at 65 °C for 00:05:00 .
6.5 µL Put samples on ice for 00:01:00 .

steps.title: Pipette 6
steps.instruction: Pipette 6.5 µL of Master Mix 2 into each sample.

steps.title: Pipette 1 µL Superscript into each sample
steps.instruction: Pipette 1 µL Superscript into each sample.

steps.title: 65 °C Incubate samples at room temp for 00:10:00
steps.instruction: 65 °C Incubate samples at room temp for 00:10:00 .

steps.title: Incubate samples at 42 °C for 00:50:00
steps.instruction: Incubate samples at 42 °C for 00:50:00 .

steps.title: Make a master mix. Per sample add the following
steps.instruction: Make a master mix. Per sample add the following: 2.0 µL 10X Buffer 1.0 µL 50 millimolar (mM) MgSO 4 0.5 µL dNTP mix ( 10 micromolar (µM) each) 18.4 µL ddH 2 O 1 µL forward primer ( 10 micromolar (µM) ) 1 µL reverse primer ( 10 micromolar (µM) ) 0.5 µL Taq polymerase

steps.title: Mix well by spinning
steps.instruction: Mix well by spinning.

steps.title: Add 24 µL of Master Mix to each PCR tube
steps.instruction: Add 24 µL of Master Mix to each PCR tube.

steps.title: Add 1 µL of sample for...
steps.instruction: Add 1 µL of sample for a total of 25 µL per tube.

steps.title: Master Mix 1
steps.instruction: Master Mix 1: add 1 µL dNTP mix and 2 µL dT primer per sample.

steps.title: Master Mix 2
steps.instruction: Master Mix 2: add 4 µL Buffer, 2 µL DTT and 0.5 µL RNAase inhibitor per sample.
